# How-to guides

Goal-oriented docs. Pick the guide that matches the problem you're
trying to solve.

```{toctree}
:maxdepth: 1

verify-installation
```

:::{admonition} More guides coming with v0.1.0
:class: note

Guides like *"Query historical weather"*, *"Handle rate limits"*, and
*"Use with Home Assistant"* land alongside the real API.
:::
